html:
“Removes saddles from a Beefalo without reducing saddle durability.”

-

The Saddlehorn is a craftable Item found in the Tools Tab. It requires 2 Twigs, 2 Bone Shards and a Jet Feather to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It allows the player to safely remove a Saddle from a Beefalo without the Beefalo needing to buck the saddle off. Prying a Saddle off with the Saddlehorn conserves saddle durability.

Trivia

  • The Saddlehorn was first introduced to Don't Starve Together. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
  • Saddlehorns are considered to be part of A New Reign, even though they were introduced before the official start of the beta branch.

Gallery

  • Wilson holding a Saddlehorn and standing next to a dropped one.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"saddlehorn"
“I can take the saddle off now.”
–Wilson
“I bet it stinks under the saddle.”
–Willow
“I won't hurt you, hair cow!”
–Wolfgang
“I'm only taking back what's mine.”
–Wendy
“HAHA, IT SHALL BE NAKED”
–WX-78
“A device for forceful unfurnishment.”
–Wickerbottom
“Puts the critter back to how nature intended.”
–Woodie
“And I may never put it back on.”
–Maxwell
“A length of curved metal for wresting a saddle off a beast's back.”
–Wagstaff
“Mighty steeds can be unsaddled with this.”
–Wigfrid
“Leaves the beast nakey.”
–Webber
“Oh, that'll help getting the saddle off.”
–Walani
“It's like a spatula for a saddle.”
–Warly
“Fer pryin' tha chair off'n tha beasties.”
–Woodlegs
“TAKETH OFF THE HAIRY BACK SEATS”
–Wilba
“Prying thing”
–Wormwood
“A shoehorn for a saddle.”
–Wheeler
“Takes a saddle off real quick.”
–Winona
“Off it comes, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Get saddle off the big fuzzy.”
–Wurt
“It can't be comfortable wearing a saddle all the time.”
–Walter
“I'll finally be able to take the saddle off that poor beast!”
–Wanda
“Removes saddles from a Beefalo without reducing saddle durability.”
-
The Saddlehorn is a craftable Item found in the Tools Tab. It requires 2 Twigs, 2 Bone Shards and a Jet Feather to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It allows the player to safely remove a Saddle from a Beefalo without the Beefalo needing to buck the saddle off. Prying a Saddle off with the Saddlehorn conserves saddle durability.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Saddlehorn was first introduced to Don't Starve Together. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
Saddlehorns are considered to be part of A New Reign, even though they were introduced before the official start of the beta branch.

Wilson holding a Saddlehorn and standing next to a dropped one.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sừng Yên Ngựa là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Công Cụ. Nó cần 2 Cành Cây, 2 Mảnh Xương và Lông Phản Lực để chế tạo, và cần Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Nó cho phép người chơi tháo Yên khỏi Bò Lai một cách an toàn mà không cần Bò Lai phải tháo yên. Cạy Yên xe bằng Sừng Yên sẽ bảo toàn độ bền của yên xe.
